ceo_briefing.what_happened: SAP is outperforming competitors in cloud growth, but faces challenges like regulatory hurdles and security issues.
ceo_briefing.why_it_matters: These trends impact SAP's market position and reputation. Addressing them will ensure sustained competitive advantage and customer trust.
ceo_briefing.what_to_do_next: Prioritize accelerating cloud and AI transformation to capitalize on current strengths while proactively managing risks in compliance and talent.
